productDisplayName: Maxima Men White Dial Ssteele Watch
description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make a slick style statement with this SSteele watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to pep-up your accessory collection! Product Details Case style: Square stainless steel case Dial style: White dial with red indicies and hands Features: Date aperture at 12 hour mark Strap stype: Genuine leather strap with red topstitching and tang clasp Water resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashes Warranty: 1 Year Size: Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 8 mm
